title: J. Forbes-Robertson
content:
I'm told the Artist who aspires
    To draw Forbes-Robertson requires
    A Sargent's brush. Dear me! how sad!
    I've lost the only one I had.
meaning:
Oliver Herford's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "J. Forbes-Robertson"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
